title: Dynamic Workers now in open beta
raw_changelog: Dynamic Workers are now in open beta. Workers can now spin up other Workers at runtime.
before_text:
## Workers API

### Creating Workers
Workers are deployed via the Wrangler CLI or API.

```
PUT /client/v4/accounts/{account_id}/workers/scripts/{script_name}
```
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -6,3 +6,14 @@
 PUT /client/v4/accounts/{account_id}/workers/scripts/{script_name}
 ```
+
+### Dynamic Workers (Beta)
+Workers can now create other Workers at runtime using the LOADER binding.
+
+```javascript
+const worker = env.LOADER.load({ ... });
+return worker.getEntrypoint().fetch(request);
+```

ground_truth.action_required: No action required. New feature available for dynamically creating Workers at runtime.
